title: Tampere, Pirkanmaa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tampere, Pirkanmaa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tampere is a city in Pirkanmaa with a population of 244,000. Finland’s sauna capital and industrial powerhouse, set between two lakes, known for its vibrant culture and education.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
